title: NASA to Compete Contract for Jet Propulsion Laboratory Management
summary: NASA announced plans Friday to compete the next contract for managing and operating the agency’s federally funded research and development center (FFRDC) in Southern California at the Jet Propulsion Laboratory (JPL), to ensure continued accountability and strong value for U.S. taxpayers. The California Institute of Technology (Caltech) has managed the laboratory since its inception in […]

title: To achieve major goals, NASA seeks to streamline its organization
summary: "It is imperative to concentrate resources towards the highest priority objectives."

title: NASA Announces Realignment to Accelerate Mission Delivery
summary: NASA announced Friday an agencywide realignment to increase mission focus and move out on the National Space Policy. These changes position the agency to better deliver on the nation’s highest‑priority objectives with speed and efficiency. During the Ignition event in late March, NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman and agency leaders outlined the most pressing objectives to […]

title: New Material Could Help NASA Melt Moon Rocks, Harness Lunar Resources
summary: A material recently discovered and tested at NASA’s Glenn Research Center in Cleveland could help astronauts pack lighter for future missions to the Moon. NASA is researching ways explorers could “live off the land” by harnessing lunar resources, including melting Moon rocks to extract metals for building infrastructure and oxygen for fuel and life support. […]

title: SpaceX IPO filing casts Starlink Mobile as future wireless challenger
summary:
SpaceX’s IPO prospectus casts Starlink Mobile as more than a remote-area backup, with next-generation direct-to-smartphone services designed to be “on par with terrestrial mobile networks” even in urban areas.

title: Rocket Lab launches ninth Synspective satellite
summary:
Rocket Lab launched another radar imaging satellite for Synspective as the company plans to sell up to $3 billion in stock to fund future initiatives.

title: Hubble Captures Galaxy Cluster
summary: Look closely at this image from NASA’s Hubble Space Telescope and you’ll see galaxies of various shapes and sizes clustered together toward the center-left of the image.
